---
id: capture-payment-intent
title: "Capture payment intent"
description: "    Capture funds for a payment intent that is in `requires_capture` status."
sidebar_label: "Capture payment intent"
hide_title: true

sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Capture payment intent"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/payment-intents/{id}/capture"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



    Capture funds for a payment intent that is in `requires_capture` status.

    Supports idempotent capture via the `IDEMPOTENCY-KEY` request header.

    ### Permissions
    * `payment:write`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
